uiBuilder.label: Toggle Card
uiBuilder.description: A single titled card with a list of on/off toggle rows (with optional required asterisk). Driven by a JSON array; drop several to build a grid.

properties.name: title
properties.label: Card title
properties.description: Heading shown at the top of the card.

properties.name: items
properties.label: Items (JSON array)
properties.description: Toggle rows. Each item: { label, on (boolean), required (boolean) }. Bind a data resource or paste JSON.

properties.name: onLabel
properties.label: On text
properties.description: Text shown next to a toggle when it is on.

properties.name: offLabel
properties.label: Off text
properties.description: Text shown next to a toggle when it is off.

properties.name: showStateText
properties.label: Show On/Off text
properties.description: When on, shows the On/Off label beside each toggle.

actions.name: TOGGLE_CHANGED
actions.label: Toggle changed
actions.description: Fired when a row's toggle is switched. Payload: { index, label, on }.

payload.name: index
payload.label: Row index
payload.description: Zero-based index of the toggled row.
